title: Google Cloud Spanner Instance
description: A Cloud Spanner instance resource that provides compute and storage capacity for Spanner databases.

name.description: The unique name of the instance in the format projects/{project}/instances/{instance}.

config.description: The name of the instance's configuration (e.g., projects/{project}/instanceConfigs/{config}).

displayName.description: The descriptive name for the instance.

nodeCount.description: The number of nodes allocated to this instance. At most one of nodeCount or processingUnits should be present.

processingUnits.description: The number of processing units allocated (100 processing units = 1 node).

state.description: The current state of the instance.

endpointUris.description: The endpoint URIs for this instance.

createTime.description: The creation time of the instance.

updateTime.description: The last update time of the instance.
